item.title: This was my beloved cousin Will. He lost his battle to bone cancer yesterday. I just wanted people to see his goofy face.
item.description: Thank you everyone. I cannot express what your response means to me in this hard time.
item.dc:creator: Alamyst2011

item.title: Reading is hard. Trying to do a "gotcha" as a right-wing apologist is harder.

item.title: Napathon [OC]
item.description:
I can sleep pretty much anytime, anywhere! Unless it’s in bed at night… you know, where you’re supposed to be sleeping!
Speaking of sleepy, here is Mr. Chonk diligently paying the cat tax <3 If you like my stuff and want to see more, come support me on Patreon! —> https://www.patreon.com/AmyRevives

item.title: Bad Bitches Memes Dump
item.description:
Probably both?
Purpose unknown...
Probably both?
Hate when I accidentally become the expert on anything
Sharing because ham
Oops
Sharing because tits
Like a dumb bitch
Serving cake
Feelin snackish

item.title: I probably shouldn’t have made this... but I did. Lady Liberty got a glow-up, grabbed her phone, and now she’s taking selfies for instagram. Sculpted, 3D printed, and painted by me.. because apparently, this is how I use my free time now.

item.title: Well, this sucks.
item.description: These people that say, "Sobriety has given me my life back"....I just can't be in this pointless existence. *Edit* So grateful for the positive comments. I'm crying with emotion trying to make coffee this morning. I'll keep trying, thanks guys, you are all truly wonderful, not a single hateful or negative person. From my heart and soul, thank you all. X
item.dc:creator: ItIsPronnouncedGifNotGif

item.title: Great Hair Day! :)
item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants

item.title: It’s not broken, it just needs some TLC
item.description:
Length warning, but 100% worth the read
Most viral edit: Thanks for the awards and upvotes, my dudes! Special shout to @bobthefunny for making me tear up about stupid robots (again). “My battery is low, and it’s getting dark” Original post below Source: https://www.jpl.nasa.gov/news/nasas-voyager-1-revives-backup-thrusters-before-command-pause/ Sorry if this is a repost. I didn’t expect to be this invested in a story about NASA being, well NASA, but holy smokes this is amazing! Reading the section about backup thrusters and heaters reminded me of the concept of graceful degradation and how we design things to keep working until the final piece comes apart.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: What the fuck?
item.description: He claims that, since fewer young people are having children we need to encourage procreation and monogamy.... Instead of, oh, I don't know, maybe a living wage, quality schools, affordable housing, health care, equal rights, you know, obstacles to raising healthy children
item.dc:creator: mrsdowneyjr

item.title: Mermay day 17, Kiwi! [OC]
item.description:
KIWI GRANNY!! I loved making this mermaid so much, shout out to everyone who’s ever needed a mastectomy <3
And tomorrow we’ve got mellon on the menu (Get ya head out of the guttah!) If you like my stuff and want to see more, come support me on Patreon! —> https://www.patreon.com/AmyRevives
item.dc:creator: AmyRevives
